concerns.text: FR-001: 'System MUST load the MiniMax-M3 model weights in frozen mode...' is addressed in the plan under 'Technical Context' and 'Project Structure' (code/models/mini_max_wrapper.py), but there's no explicit 'addressed by FR-001' annotation.

FR-002: 'System MUST implement the "Local Gradient Magnitude" heuristic...' is addressed in the plan under 'Technical Context' and 'Project Structure' (code/heuristics/gradient_magnitude.py), but lacks an explicit 'addressed by FR-002' annotation.

FR-003: 'System MUST implement "Block Entropy" and "Recency-Weighted Positional Bias" heuristics...' is addressed in the plan under 'Technical Context' and 'Project Structure' (code/heuristics/*), but lacks an explicit 'addressed by FR-003' annotation.

FR-004: 'System MUST execute the RULER benchmark tasks...' is addressed in the plan under 'Summary', 'Technical Context', and 'Project Structure' (code/main.py), but lacks an explicit 'addressed by FR-004' annotation.

FR-005: 'System MUST perform a Wilcoxon signed-rank test...' is addressed in the plan under 'Technical Context' and 'Project Structure' (code/analysis/stats.py), but lacks an explicit 'addressed by FR-005' annotation.

FR-006: 'System MUST execute a sensitivity analysis...' is addressed in the plan under 'Technical Context' and 'Project Structure' (code/main.py, code/analysis/stats.py), but lacks an explicit 'addressed by FR-006' annotation.

SC-001: 'The accuracy difference (Exact Match) between the Local Gradient Magnitude heuristic and the dense baseline is measured against the 2% tolerance threshold...' is addressed in the plan under 'Summary' and 'Statistical Analysis Plan', but lacks an explicit 'addressed by SC-001' annotation.

SC-002: 'The statistical significance of the heuristic's performance is measured against a p-value threshold of 0.05...' is addressed in the plan under 'Statistical Analysis Plan', but lacks an explicit 'addressed by SC-002' annotation.

SC-003: 'The computational efficiency (CPU time and memory footprint)...' is addressed in the plan under 'Complexity Tracking' and 'Statistical Analysis Plan', but lacks an explicit 'addressed by SC-003' annotation.

SC-004: 'The robustness of the selection strategy is measured against a sensitivity curve...' is addressed in the plan under 'Statistical Analysis Plan', but lacks an explicit 'addressed by SC-004' annotation.

SC-005: 'The feasibility of the method is measured against the constraint of completing the full RULER evaluation suite...' is addressed in the plan under 'Computational Feasibility & Rationale', but lacks an explicit 'addressed by SC-005' annotation.
